scenario: Authoring tests for a new payment-flow feature — want to know which layer(s) to cover and what oracle to use
when_to_pick: Pre-write authoring guidance for a new feature

scenario: E2E suite takes 45 minutes and the team avoids running it — want to know what to delete and what to keep
when_to_pick: You have a slow suite and want a deletion list with rationale, not just blanket cuts

scenario: Quarterly review of the test pyramid/trophy — where to invest next quarter, where to disinvest
when_to_pick: Cross-layer investment recommendation, not a per-test review
